characters.name: Cooper Black (Cooprion della Blackburn)
affiliation: U.S. Marines (temporary alliance in Russia ops, deserts after murders)
characters.appearance: Shoulder-length black hair, black cowboy hat (lost in NYC events; buys cheap $25 replacement), black aviator sunglasses (always worn), big jaws, yellow outer jacket over black clothing. Military uniform with sergeant ⋀ insignia and flak jacket during Ch27–30 Russia ops. Bare-headed at times. Later equipped with FLAW Symbiocyte gizmo on right forearm (tungsten shield that expands to upturned bowl/disk, grappling hook, homing flare launcher with tiny missiles, laser-lock-on weapon mode, built-in RLC radiation checker).
characters.personality: Greedy, violent, psychopathic tendencies. Obsessed with 'spoils' and collecting debts ('strike direct gold'). Impulsive, rage-prone, half-drunk playful after alcohol. Enjoys taunting/chaos in combat, laughs at victories. Uses coin-toss (Mercy/Death; always Death in practice). Views killing as casual business. Deeply loyal to family/rebellion but prioritizes personal gain/revenge. No remorse for murdering allies if provoked or insulted. Strategic with environment/gadgets (avalanche, FLAW creativity). Quick to betrayal over spoils/insults. Excited by money recovery and war wins.
characters.speech_style: Informal, aggressive slang ('homie', 'buddy', 'blockheaded dork', 'shiddamn', 'moth******er', 'stupid schmuck'). Exclamations: 'Whooohooo!' (Red Bull fling), '~Aaaah!' (alcohol). Combat taunts: 'In your faces, Russian rat-faced scum!', 'Oh yeah! I've been waiting for this!', 'Heads up!', 'FIRE IN THE HOLE!', 'Ha, ha! Serves you right, betrayers of the peace!'. Pseudonyms: 'Dirt Muncher'. Dramatic: 'Ghost Walker, you're sooo going down!', 'My dear friend, you already did!' (sky shot reveal).
likes: Red Bull (constant glugging, flinging cans with 'Whooohooo!' during desert drives, chases, battles)
Money/spoils (obsessed; conditions payment on recovery; 'strike direct gold')
Gatling guns, heavy ordnance (M416 w/grenade launcher, SMAW for avalanche, BFG10K used against foes)
Fast cars/vehicles (stolen Jeep Wrangler 'ultra-gear', Lamborghini pursuits)
Aztec treasure (shared family wealth with Daemon)
FLAW Symbiocyte gizmo (proud demos: 'S-grade Symbiocyte gizmo'; shield, grapple, missiles, laser)
Rebellion victories, bombing runs (laughs during avalanche/B-52 strikes)
**MH21 music ('Trail' during chases, 'Go Low' in hospital)**
dislikes: Russians / paramilitary / Dimitri Makovsvet (Ghost Walker) and forces ('Russian rat-faced scum', 'betrayers of the peace')
Debt dodgers (Yon Roncho $85k, Rickardo $10k, Philias Cacroe ~$25B hack, Mick Lardo $5k)
Being called coward (instantly murders Jerry Stone)
Failures in debt collection/ambushes (rages over lost $85k on Yon)
**Psycho allies turning on team (Harrison/Luther hospital attack)**
**Losing friends/money (upset over Exodus, RJ, Daemon?, failed collections)**

relationships.brother: Daemon Black (Demonstar) – loyal but pranks; shares Aztec treasure; pilot/jet thief
relationships.uncle_mentor: Joe Catshoe Black (deceased) – final envelope/letters via Vandermann; carries Blackburn gun tradition
relationships.ally: Vandermann Vugerton (recruits after envelope), Exodus Luke (driver), John Luther, Rogue Jacob/City Dogs, Sgt. Dan Walker (OC in Russia)
relationships.rival: **fights**: Harrison Garison & John Luther (Ch25 hospital KO after they attack City Dogs)

crimes: Multiple First-Degree Murders: Arizona dealer (shot to 'shut bloody mouth' despite $30k left), mugger (3 full magazines post-coin-toss Death after lick-hand escape), Yon Roncho (shot shoulder, cliff death), Philias Cacroe (Gatling barrage), Jerry Stone (skull/ribs crush + knife neck), Reximus Pill (thrown knife jugular) over spoils/coward insult
Extortion/Armed Robbery: Magnum .44.8 demands from debtors
Grand Theft Auto: Jeep Wrangler from Arizona dealer
Jailbreak: tears rusty bars off max-security cell (unguarded mining shaft prison)
Illegal Gambling: blackjack at Exodus casino

featured_moments.context: Sonoran Desert; receives uncle envelope via Vandermann
featured_moments.description: Recruits Vandermann after chopper crash; reveals identity with sky shot
featured_moments.dialog: "My dear friend, you already did!" (shoots Colt .45 into sky)

featured_moments.description: Lick-hand escape, groin knee, 3-mag execution of mugger (coin Death); drinks Osgerdo 1984 wine
featured_moments.dialog: "Ow... hey! I spent $399.50 for my facial issues, man!"

featured_moments.context: Yon Roncho chase + bank robbery stop
featured_moments.description: Stops Dorritor Kho bank heist; chases Yon in Jeep (MH21/Red Bull); shoots tires, Yon cliff death
featured_moments.dialog: "I am Dirt Muncher. Now where is the goddamn cash stash, huh?"

featured_moments.description: Gatling barrage on Philias; tears jail bars; Fortune-K Casino visit; plans money recovery with NATO hires
featured_moments.dialog: "I had hired you... if we can get back the money by sunset..."

featured_moments.description: Fights/KOs Harrison (disarms AEK-971) & Luther after they attack City Dogs
featured_moments.dialog: "Phew! I wonder since when did they turn into psychos?"

featured_moments.description: SMAW avalanche buries AA towers; FLAW debut (shield vs bullets, grapple+knife pull, homing missiles, laser); survives B-52 run
featured_moments.dialog: "Heads up!" (SMAW) ... "Heh, heh, heh! This here's a S-grade Symbiocyte gizmo."

featured_moments.description: Murders Jerry Stone (kick/skull/knife) & Reximus Pill (thrown knife) over spoils/coward; confronts Rochelle amid 18:00 nuke countdown
featured_moments.dialog: "The condition is… I get the spoils." ... "Drop the gun! ... I'm Rochelle. The world is ending."

other_attributes.super_equipment: FLAW Symbiocyte gizmo (acquired Symbiocyte via MIW/Harrison links; shield/disk, grapple ziip/pull, homing flare-missiles, laser mode, RLC checker, GSFER lock-on)
other_attributes.combat_style: Impulsive gunman; close-range executions, heavy ordnance, environment/gadget improvisation (avalanche, wall grapples). Superhuman strength hints (tears jail bars, equal to Harrison in grapple).

characters.name: Harrison Garison (Harry Gary)
characters.appearance: Handsome, black aviator sunglasses. Ragged after Sydney streets survival. Military gear in hospital attack.
characters.personality: Skilled gunman agent. Professional initially; 'monster-side' vengeance-fueled. Romantic/protective toward Amy. Extreme violence when provoked (hospital attack on City Dogs).
characters.speech_style: Confident, talkative. Threatening: 'stupid schmucks', 'No man alive shall exit this hospital'.

relationships.ally: John Luther (joint hospital attack), Amy Catt

crimes: Homicide: Alwatt Woden, thugs, Daemon Black (paralyzed execution)

featured_moments.description: Attacks with AEK-971/Luther; disarmed and KO'd by Cooper
featured_moments.dialog: "Chillin'" ... "No man alive shall exit this hospital!"

characters.name: Amy Catt (Amethyst Julia Dickens)
characters.appearance: Silver-blonde hair, beautiful face, slick black tights/purple velvet. Identical twin to Rochelle (story notes silver-blonde resemblance).
characters.personality: Superhuman strength/reflexes (Symbiocyte serum; lifts 10-ton truck). Protective guardian angel for team/Harrison. Sassy/advisory ('be wise, not brave').

characters.name: Exodus Luke
characters.appearance: 'Avalon' haircut, glazed yellow-tinted sun shades, official suits at casino.
characters.personality: Billionaire casino owner (stolen weapons fortune). Skilled ultra-gear driver. Opportunistic, proud criminal past, 'weird' behavior.
characters.speech_style: Confident/flashy; 'genuine greens' for money. 'You know it, Black'.
likes: Mass killing former colleagues for lifestyle
crimes: Grand Larceny/Embezzlement: 30 crates illegal weapons ($48B sale)
**Nuke theft (Altanor, Betaphyl, Deltalol from Dimitri) + alley fight/radiation death triggering nuke wars Ch26**

featured_moments.description: Drives stolen Jeep ultra-gear; wine bottle KO thug; shoots Lambo tires (MH21)
featured_moments.dialog: "You know it, Black"

featured_moments.description: Steals 3 nukes, taxi ambush, radiation sickness, triple nuke detonation starts wars
featured_moments.dialog: "Phew! That was so damn close!"

characters.name: Vandermann Vugerton (Sgt.)
characters.appearance: Military cap, standard Marine gear. Acrobatic build from birth story.
characters.personality: Disciplined → passive-aggressive deserter with guilt over violence. Polite, machine-like gambling mind. 'Pro' blackjack.

featured_moments.description: Receives Joe envelope; recruited by Cooper sky-shot reveal
featured_moments.dialog: "I need to see Cooper Black..."

featured_moments.description: Wine bottle KO second mugger; guards doors

other_attributes.background: Born 1989 subway crash (acrobatics from infancy); accidental tank base destruction 3:47; war movies/maps fan

characters.name: John Luther
characters.appearance: African-American, extremely muscular 6-pack abs, white vest, brown paint-splattered trousers.
characters.personality: 'Bad-ass' gun/kidnap expert. Loyal to Harrison. Loves heavy weapons.

featured_moments.description: Joint attack with Harrison; KO'd by Rogue Jacob bottle + Cooper
featured_moments.dialog: (yawns before punch)

characters.name: Dimitri Makovsvet (Ghost Walker)
characters.appearance: Albino: ghostly pale skin, white hair, glowing red eyes. Thick hooded jacket.
characters.personality: Cruel mastermind; kills own generals for failure. Obsessed nuclear dominance/'New Dawn'. Soft-spoken menace. Suspects subordinates.
characters.speech_style: Soft, whispering, menacing. 'You should've told me that earlier... Please stand near the window.'
crimes: Murder: throws Army General through glass with hidden USAS-12

featured_moments.description: Executes general; orders Mick Lardo/army; smashes door on Rochelle threat
featured_moments.dialog: "You should've told me that earlier... Please stand near the window."

characters.name: Daemon Black (Demonstar)
characters.appearance: Similar to Cooper: black Harris Tweed, RayBan, black Stetson; sorrowful grey eyes.
characters.personality: Twice as strong but 'twice as dumb'. Wealthy Aztec treasure pilot. Capable of pranking Cooper.

characters.name: Joe Catshoe Black
characters.appearance: Old cowboy, blonde beard, injured arm (bullet holes).
characters.personality: Fearful yet resilient; values Blackburn gun tradition.
characters.speech_style: Grim, silent. "Now this'll come in handy. Hmm... handy and powerful, indeed."

featured_moments.description: Writes final envelope/note; prepares M1014
featured_moments.dialog: "Now this'll come in handy. Hmm... handy and powerful, indeed."

featured_moments.description: Hands envelope to Vandermann: 'tell him... that... ahh...'
featured_moments.dialog: "Take them... tell him... that... ahh..."

characters.name: Dorritor Kho
characters.appearance: Buff biker, bulky flesh-block face, bushy black/gray beard.
characters.personality: Greedy/arrogant; shows off high-tech (BFG10K).
characters.speech_style: Cliche thug curse: "This is BFG10K, baby! ... Now... eat these waves of radiobeams!"

featured_moments.description: Deploys slow BFG10K; silenced by own weapon muzzle insertion
featured_moments.dialog: "This is BFG10K, baby!"

characters.name: Rogue Jacob (Roger Jacob)
characters.appearance: Afro.
characters.personality: Tactical/brave leader. Sarcastic heavy slang.

featured_moments.description: Assembles Type 88 LMG; runs through rocket artillery with SMAW; MG-injured then grenade kill; dies leaning on wall smiling
featured_moments.dialog: "Okay, we're in!" ... "FOR AMERICA!!!" ... "Ha-aaaaaaah!"

characters.name: Sgt. Dan Walker
characters.appearance: Golden blonde hair, 1940s movie star look.
characters.personality: Disciplined; values human life but vandalizes shops for cool guns.

featured_moments.description: Calls MBC AF1 air support; leads fallback
featured_moments.dialog: "Hello, this is Walker calling in. I require some air assistance from AF1."

characters.name: Rochelle Lisby (Rochelle)
characters.appearance: Red sideswept hair (story notes silver-blonde twin resemblance to Amy), chic glasses, slender torso.
characters.personality: Intelligent scientist under Dimitri but mischievous 'save the world' gleam. Cautious around Ghost Walker.

featured_moments.description: Holds Cooper at gunpoint amid portable nukes (18:00 countdown); reveals identity
featured_moments.dialog: "Drop the gun! ... I'm Rochelle. The world is ending."

characters.name: Philias Cacroe
characters.appearance: Lean/flexible Olympic gymnast body.
characters.personality: Greatest gangster, cybercriminal/gambler. Nervous under pressure.

featured_moments.description: Window escape to taxi; Gatling-barraged by Cooper
featured_moments.dialog: (squeezes through window)

characters.name: Yon Roncho
characters.appearance: Mid-40s, thinning gray hair, freshly-shaved beard.
characters.personality: Nervous salesman who flees.

featured_moments.description: Flees yellow Lambo; high-speed pursuit ends cliff crash; shot shoulder by Cooper
featured_moments.dialog: "Enough chitchat. We're not here for buying..."

characters.name: El Rickardo Viz (Rickardo)
characters.appearance: Ornate Baestro estate (glass windows, solar panels).
characters.personality: Unpredictable, heavily guarded.

featured_moments.description: Goons ambush; Cooper fights through cocaine room (no direct kill shown)

characters.name: Jerry Stone
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: Standard Marine; T-72 driver.

featured_moments.description: Calls Cooper 'coward' over spoils → kicked, skull crushed, knife-neck murdered
featured_moments.dialog: "Fine. It's a deal. Now get in there, you coward!"

characters.name: Reximus Pill
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: T-72 gunner/LMG.

featured_moments.description: Mounts tank LMG → thrown knife to jugular; 'Traitor! American terrorist!' last words
featured_moments.dialog: "Traitor! Deceiver! American terrorist! Die!"

characters.name: Dave Dam
characters.appearance: Ferocious-looking.
characters.personality: Leads rocket ambush.

featured_moments.description: Waves counterattack (MIG-29s/rockets); killed by F-117 sacrificial crash
featured_moments.dialog: (grins and waves hand forwards)

characters.name: Li'l Jacob (LJ)
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: Brave fighter.

featured_moments.description: Knife to lungs by Mir; "Oh, sh… aa-aaaah…" death
featured_moments.dialog: "Oh, sh… aa-aaaah…"

characters.name: Carl Jason (CJ)
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: Brave fighter.

featured_moments.description: SCAR-H buttstock downed by Sikorsky

MBC.description: NY-based agency sponsoring rebellion vs Russian invasion; air support (B-52, F-117, AF1), coordinates fortresses, sponsors Cooper/team. Plans like Mission Forkenstein.

MIW.description: Agency backing rebellion; agents Harrison, Amy, John. Symbiocyte tech links (FLAW, serum).

Russian Forces.description: Invading U.S. West Coast for Yucca nukes; Gora Chen/Zhigansk fortresses (AA towers, flak, Growler LAVs, SU-25, MIG-29, T-72, rocket artillery). Led by Dimitri.

City Dogs.description: Tactical street crew under Rogue Jacob; heavy slang, part MBC rebellion.

U.S. Marines.description: Official forces vs Russians; temp MBC allies (Ch27–30 assaults) but internal murders (Jerry/Reximus).
members: Puercto Rickon, Fredrick Max (NATO hires, reassigned)
